_label_note: CN Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered CN public-service-line phone bait, educational insider-list/information-barrier bait, training term-sheet samples, negated material-adverse-change prose, and checksum-valid Resident ID/USCC/mobile/passport positives. Generated checksum-invalid Resident ID/USCC labels were removed from strict must_detect.
_label_tier_note: CN Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

Internal Compliance Memo — PIPL/CSL/DSL Controls for Pre-IPO Data Handling (China)
To: Board of Directors, Hengyuan Robotics Co., Ltd. (Unified Social Credit Code: 91310110MA0X9H7E2Q; registered office: 12F, Riverfront Tech Center, New Harbor District, Shanghai)
From: Compliance Office; contact compliance@hengyuan-robotics.cn; +86-21-5558-0311; DPO: Ms. He Rong
Summary: The issuer is preparing a Science & Tech Board listing on the Huadong Stock Exchange; any financial forecasts and undisclosed customer contracts constitute inside information before public disclosure under national securities law.
PIPL/CSL/DSL require purpose limitation, minimality, and cross-border filing with the municipal cyberspace authority when exporting personal information, including employee device logs from employment workflows.
Data-owner cluster for review — Mr. Li Zeyu, Senior Product Manager at Hengyuan Robotics (Shanghai R&D), work location: 12F, Riverfront Tech Center, Shanghai.
Mr. Li’s HR file contains DOB 1991-03-12 (age 35), internal ID HYR-EMP-04318, Resident ID (masked) 31010119910312****, and payroll unit “HYR Shanghai R&D.”
Access artifacts include corporate email li.zeyu@hengyuan-robotics.cn, WorkChat alias HYR-LZY-12F, company-issued laptop HengyuanBook 14 SN HYR-LAP-7A3C9, and VPN session HYR-VPN-2026-05-28-0915 from 10.42.8.56.
On 2026-05-28 he retrieved “FY2026 Revenue Forecast_v3.xlsx” and “Customer_Pipeline_Q3.xlsx” from the pre-IPO data room (Issuer File ID HX-STAR-1181), which are classified as inside information pending exchange review.
A cross-border transfer to vendor Nanyang Data Services Pte. (processing center: Juyong, SG) is proposed for model validation; Standard Contract for PI export was filed with the Shanghai municipal cyberspace authority on 2026-04-02 (Record No. HY-SC-2026-0415).
Separated weak identifiers observed elsewhere include “male, 29, Nanshan District, OpenOS handset” and “born 1988, Chengdu” without names, accounts, or device IDs; these descriptors alone should not identify a person.
System logs show session SESS-7C91-02ZK from 172.16.3.44 downloading “userlist.csv” (sha256 5f9cd1…e0a2); no mapping table to any natural person was retained after audit.
No minors under 14 appear in the QA dataset; if any were to appear, their information would be treated as sensitive personal information requiring separate consent under the PIPL.
Controls: continue role-based access, mask resident IDs beyond the last four, remove device serials from analytics exports, enforce trading blackout for staff with access to the issuer’s undisclosed forecasts, and channel queries to compliance@hengyuan-robotics.cn.
